cells.rationale: Greenfield routing core with a novel worst-window headroom selector, adversarial subprocess parsers, PII/credential containment, and a concurrency-atomic flock ledger - multiple nameable security and correctness invariants gate opus.

Correctness-critical Claude process boundary: byte-exact argv forwarding across the nested -- and every launch channel plus lost-handoff ambiguity that must never double-launch, a cross-cutting cascade warranting opus over a byte-pinned GPT pick.
Event-sourcing schema step, deterministic fold, and re-fold equivalence over attacker-influenced hook data - schema and migration work is a correctness-critical opus gate even though templated.

Delicate surgical separation of intertwined guard and profile-farm machinery that must preserve resume correctness and global-instruction guards - judgment- and idiom-heavy removal whose hazards are dependency-guarded and test-pinned, so sonnet over opus.

Wide, well-specified mechanical deletion of the usage stack with an explicit keep-scope and depgraph completeness checks - GPT-first big-working-set navigation at the default band with no deep judgment or propagating abstraction.

Destructive schema-singleton migration that must idempotently drop projections, avoid dead-lettering historical events, and preserve deterministic re-fold and live-only rewind boundaries - a clear subtle-correctness opus gate.

User-facing docs pruning under strict house discipline - lean present-tense prose, guardrail-versus-glossary judgment, and precise two-CLI role framing - taste and idiom work that routes to sonnet at the default band.
